zh.Paston, Norfolkshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可柏斯頓

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Mautbey於1375年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可柏斯頓時，他的父親John Mauteby36歲，母親Eleanor De Clifton42歲。他和Margaret de Beauchamp至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1418年4月28日在他的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Mautbey于1375年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可柏斯頓时，他的父亲John Mauteby36岁，母亲Eleanor De Clifton42岁。他和Margaret de Beauchamp至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1418年4月28日在他的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Mautbey was born in 1375, in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mauteby, was 36 and his mother, Eleanor De Clifton, was 42. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret de Beauchamp. He died on 28 April 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Mautbey est né en 1375, à Paston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mauteby, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eleanor De Clifton, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret de Beauchamp. Il est décédé le 28 avril 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Mautbey 1375 in Paston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mauteby 36 und seine Mutter Eleanor De Clifton 42. Er hatte mit Margaret de Beauchamp mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. April 1418 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Mautbey è nato il nel 1375 nel Paston, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Mauteby, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor De Clifton, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret de Beauchamp. Morì il 28 aprile 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Mautbeyが1375年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクプアストンで生まれた時，父John Mautebyは36歳，母Eleanor De Cliftonは42歳であった。彼はMargaret de Beauchampとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1418年4月28日に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Mautbey(이)가 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mauteby(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor De Clifton(은)는 42세였다. 그는 Margaret de Beauchamp(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 4월 28일 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Mautbey nasceu em 1375, em Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mauteby, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor De Clifton, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Margaret de Beauchamp. Ele faleceu em 28 de abril de 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Mautbey родился в 1375 г. в местности пастон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mauteby было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor De Clifton, 42. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Margaret de Beauchamp. Он умер 28 апреля 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Mautbey nació en 1375, en Paston, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mauteby, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Eleanor De Clifton, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Margaret de Beauchamp. Murió el 28 de abril de 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
